name: wormhole
description: Evidence-gated planning orchestration for AI coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Wormhole provides a local MCP planning kernel with JSONL state, evidence records, open-question gates, Markdown plan artifacts, live sub-orchestrator control, external agent dispatch, Printing Press CLI registration, deterministic orchestration helpers, typed artifacts, and static workbench rendering. Codex should use the Wormhole loop for planning and orchestration: start a mission, start a round, gather and record evidence, register tasks or agents when parallel work is useful, register Printing Press CLIs as Wormhole agents before dispatch, request the gate, and emit the final plan only after the gate opens.
defaultPrompt: Run this through Wormhole: mission_start, round_start, record evidence, resolve questions, gate_request, then emit_plan.
Use Wormhole orchestration for this feature: register tasks, external agents, or Printing Press CLIs only when parallel work is useful.
Produce a cited Wormhole implementation plan and do not emit it until the evidence gate opens.
